since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.18%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.39% · Gold -0.39% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.18%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.18%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -6.32%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +2.73%, NOW +2.34%, SAP +1.95%, CRM +1.77%, CRWD +1.76%. Laggards: MU -6.32%, AMAT -5.36%, LRCX -5.24%, ZBRA -5.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.85% at $157.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.85% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
